name: RadarChart

unions.name: AxisStyle
unions.comment:
Axis style:

  - `Minimal` is just a line
  - `Web count` is a web with `count` "divisions"

unions.name: LineStyle
unions.comment: The line style can be `Empty` (just lines) or `Filled opacity` (more like an area chart).

aliases.name: DatumSeries
aliases.comment: You can have multiple "series" or polygons on one chart

aliases.name: Options
aliases.comment:
Chart styling options:

  - `fontSize` See <https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/SVG/Attribute/font-size>
  - `margin` Between 0 and 1, to leave some space for labels
  - `strokeWidth` For all lines, see <https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/SVG/Attribute/stroke-width>
  - `axisColor` axis stroke color, any valid HTML color string (hex, color-name, rgba(...), etc.)
  - `axisStyle` see `AxisStyle`
  - `lineStyle` see `LineStyle`
aliases.type: { fontSize : Basics.Float, margin : Basics.Float, strokeWidth : Basics.Float, axisColor : String.String, axisStyle : RadarChart.AxisStyle, lineStyle : RadarChart.LineStyle }

values.name: view
values.comment: Render a radar chart with options, labels, and some values
values.type: RadarChart.Options -> List.List String.String -> List.List RadarChart.DatumSeries -> Svg.Svg msg
